series_metadata.series_title: Section 5303, 5304 and 5305 Metropolitan and Statewide Planning Programs
series_metadata.series_description: Grant applications, rejected grant applications, contracts, invoices, and correspondence pertaining to ODOT''s Metropolitan and Statewide Planning Program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until scanned into electronic media then destroy paper ; Electronic: Retain electronic invoices for 3 years after grant closeout. Retain electronic versions of grant applications, contracts, and correspondence for 5 years after grant closeout., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
